title: Right Click CPS
body:
# ⚡ Right Click CPS **Unleash the full potential of your right-click.** ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21--1.21.1-brightgreen?style=flat-square) ![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-informational?style=flat-square) ![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric_Loader-0.15.0+-blue?style=flat-square) ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow?style=flat-square)
--- ![With Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bOeNKXAu/images/47120b8e5811d18daf25b5adbc0a39a5ac721f1c.gif) ### With Mod --- ![Without Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bOeNKXAu/images/d13f5083b9fdbc7b1752e0a254e9338b6982f84b.gif) ### Without Mod --- ## 🔥 What is Right Click CPS? Vanilla Minecraft limits right-click hold to only **5 CPS** — a frustrating bottleneck for PvP players, builders, and anyone who relies on fast item usage. **Right Click CPS** removes that limitation and boosts your right-click hold rate to a smooth **20 CPS**, giving you faster block placement, quicker item usage, and a more responsive gameplay experience — all with zero configuration required. This is especially useful if you: - Play on a **touchscreen device** (phone, tablet, or touchpad) where physical clicking techniques aren't possible - Can't perform **Drag Clicking**, **Butterfly Clicking**, or **Jitter Clicking** due to your mouse or hand limitations - Want consistent high CPS without relying on hardware tricks --- ## ✨ Features - 🚀 **20 CPS on hold** — replaces the vanilla 5 CPS cap on right-click hold - 🎮 **Works everywhere** — building, eating, using items, shooting bows, placing blocks - 🪶 **Lightweight** — no config files, no overhead, just plug and play - 📱 **Touchscreen & accessibility friendly** — perfect for players who can't Drag Click, Butterfly Click, or Jitter Click - 🔧 **No Fabric API required** — only needs Fabric Loader `0.15.0+` --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Make sure you have [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) `0.15.0` or newer installed 2. Download the `.jar` file for your Minecraft version 3. Drop it into your `.minecraft/mods/` folder 4. Launch the game — that's it! > ⚠️ **No Fabric API needed.** Just the loader. --- ## 🎯 Compatibility | Minecraft Version | Supported | |:-:|:-:| | 1.21.1 | ✅ | | 1.21 | ✅ | | Below 1.21 | ❌ | --- ## ⌨️ How to Use | Action | Key | |:-:|:-:| | Toggle mod on/off | **Right Alt** | --- ## 🐛 Known Issues This mod is still in active development. Some bugs are known and will be fixed in future updates. Feel free to report any issues you encounter on the project page! --- ## ⚠️ Fair Use Warning > **Do NOT use this mod on servers that prohibit auto-clickers or macros.** > Many anti-cheat systems (like NoCheatPlus, Grim, or Spartan) may detect the increased CPS and flag your account. > **Using this mod on such servers may result in a permanent ban.** > > Always check the server rules before enabling this mod. Use it at your own risk. --- ## 💬 Feedback Have a suggestion or found a bug? Open an issue on the project page — all feedback is welcome! ---
*Made with ❤️ for the Minecraft community*
